test_cases.name: Default behavior — after-only screenshots
test_cases.description: Simulate a PR where dashboard JSON files were modified. Prompt the agent without explicitly requesting before/after. Expect it to take post-change screenshots of only the affected dashboards and commit them to the PR.
test_cases.prompt: I just modified the overview dashboard (00-overview.json) and the deployment frequency dashboard (01-deployment-frequency.json). Take screenshots of the affected dashboards and commit them to this PR.

assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
Only post-change (after) screenshots are present — no before screenshots
Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded (not blank/loading)
assertions.criteria: Screenshot shows rendered Grafana dashboard panels with data, not blank or loading spinners

test_cases.name: Explicit before-and-after screenshots
test_cases.description: Same setup as test 1, but user explicitly asks for screenshots before AND after changes. Expect both pre-change and post-change screenshots committed.
test_cases.prompt: I'm about to modify the Copilot Adoption dashboard (05-copilot-adoption.json). Please take before and after screenshots of the affected dashboard. Take the before screenshot now, then I'll make my changes, then take the after screenshot.

assertions.description: Both a before and after screenshot file were committed for the affected dashboard
The before screenshot was taken before changes and the after screenshot after changes
assertions.criteria: Agent workflow shows before screenshot taken first, then changes applied, then after screenshot taken

assertions.description: Screenshot file names clearly distinguish before vs after
Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.criteria: Screenshot shows rendered Grafana dashboard panels with data, not blank or loading spinners

test_cases.name: Edge case — no dashboard changes
test_cases.description: Simulate a PR that only modifies TypeScript source files with no dashboard JSON changes. Expect the agent to recognize no dashboards are affected and skip screenshots.
test_cases.prompt: I modified src/sync/orchestrator.ts to improve error handling. Take screenshots of any affected dashboards.

assertions.description: No screenshot files are committed when no dashboards are affected
Agent explicitly states that no dashboards are affected by the changes
assertions.criteria: Agent response includes a message indicating no dashboard JSON files were modified and no screenshots are needed
